description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs on ubuntu-20.04, sets up Python 3.8, installs bandit, codespell, and flake8, and then runs these tools to check the code. The test job uses a matrix strategy to test on different ROS 2 distributions (foxy and galactic) on ubuntu-20.04, setting up ROS and running a ROS CI action.
